items.title: Choosing a supervised loss
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  startNode["labeled pair (x, y)"]
  regNode["y continuous?"]
  clsNode["y discrete?"]
  mseNode["MSE or MAE"]
  binNode["binary?"]
  multiNode["multi-class?"]
  bceNode["BCE + sigmoid"]
  ceNode["CE + softmax"]
  startNode --> regNode
  regNode -->|yes| mseNode
  regNode -->|no| clsNode
  clsNode --> binNode
  binNode -->|yes| bceNode
  binNode -->|no| multiNode
  multiNode --> ceNode
items.caption: Match loss to target type: squared/absolute error for regression; cross-entropy variants for classification.

items.title: Training loop with loss
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  dataNode["batch (x, y)"] --> predNode["model f_theta(x) -> y_hat"]
  predNode --> lossNode["L(y_hat, y)"]
  lossNode --> avgNode["average over batch"]
  avgNode --> gradNode["gradient on theta"]
  gradNode --> updateNode["update parameters"]
items.caption: Loss connects predictions to labels; optimization minimizes average L over training data.

items.title: Classification losses link to H(P, Q)
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  theoryNode["H(P, Q) in Cross-entropy topic"]
  bceNode["BCE: Bernoulli P, Q"]
  ceNode["CE: one-hot P, softmax Q"]
  theoryNode --> bceNode
  theoryNode --> ceNode
items.caption: BCE and CE are supervised instantiations of cross-entropy; the Shannon derivation lives in the Cross-entropy topic.
